release_review.summary: Runtime Service attach contract update: Desktop now records capability/binding state for the local Flower model bridge and treats the final running runtime snapshot as the source of truth for SSH attach decisions.
checked_surfaces: Runtime Service snapshot capability and binding state normalization
Desktop SSH attach and final runtime identity validation
Desktop AI Broker runtime-control binding RPC
Env App Flower settings and runtime status presentation
Env App local runtime health and startup report carriers
Desktop AI Broker model bridge startup and expiry handling
SSH-managed runtime bootstrap and attach flow
Env App sys.ping runtime service payload
